detailedExemplarData.title: To what extent does the placement of the chorus in relation to Golden Ratio correlate with the popularity, as measured by Spotify streams of songs from Billie Eilishâs debut album âWhen We All Fall Asleep, Where Do We Go?â

subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Clear and sustained coherence with a logical progression through introduction, methods, results and conclusion
Wellâorganized structure with a detailed table of contents, labelled tables and numbered appendices
Mostly concise and relevant presentation of mathematical arguments and references back to the research question
weaknesses: Minor breaks in logic (e.g. sudden appearance of Fourier analysis) and misplaced headings
Superfluous background detail and lengthy code listings reduce conciseness
Typographical clutter (inconsistent decimal places, stray overline, citation style mix) detracts from polish
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration demonstrates good coherence and logical development, and is well organized into a clear threeâpart structure. While there are minor lapses (duplicated headings, misplaced code, extraneous biographical material), the narrative remains focused and the presentation meets the descriptor for a Band 3 performance.

strengths: Generally correct use of mathematical terminology (Pearsonâs r, Ï, coefficient of determination) and mostly accurate notation
Logical sequence of formulaâsubstitutionâinterpretation with clear paragraphing
Some use of tables and algebraic expressions to convey results
weaknesses: No graphical representations (scatter plots, histograms) to support statistical analysis
Inconsistent precision and typographical errors in notation and code labels
Limited use of multiple forms of representation reduces the effectiveness of communication
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Mathematical language and structure are mostly clear and consistent, but the absence of key visual representations and persistent notational inconsistencies limit the criterion to a Band 2 level rather than higher.

strengths: Clear independent thinking in selecting an original data set and writing custom Python scripts
Personal interest in the subject (Billie Eilish) drives the choice of variables and methodology
Good level of creativity in applying the golden ratio and Fibonacci concepts to pop music
weaknesses: Mathematical techniques employed are largely routine and drawn from standard packages
Approach, while personal, does not push into exceptionally innovative territory
Initiative is shown but limited by moderate mathematical complexity
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration exhibits significant independent thinking and a clear personal approach, with creative application of mathematical ideas. However, the techniques remain fairly standard, placing the work solidly at a Band 2 level for personal engagement.

strengths: Meaningful reflection on statistical significance, sample size limitations and confounding variables
Clear evaluation of outcomes and implications, with suggestions for future research
Thoughtful analysis of methodological choices woven throughout the discussion
weaknesses: Reflection remains at a descriptive rather than deeply critical level (no alternative model exploration or error analysis)
Quantitative evaluation lacks detail (e.g. confidence intervals, percentage interpretations)
Some contradictions (manual vs software methodology) and speculative statements reduce analytical depth
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student provides consistent and meaningful reflection on results and methodology, acknowledging limitations and proposing extensions. The analysis remains at a Band 2 level, lacking the depth and insight required for a higher score.

strengths: Relevant mathematics (goldenâratio calculations, percentage matches, Pearson correlation) directly addresses the research question
Calculations are appropriately targeted and mostly correct in context
Use of algebra and statistics demonstrates a reasonable understanding of SL content
weaknesses: Mathematics is limited to basic SLâlevel techniques with no higherâlevel extension
Numerous notation and coding errors (limit notation, syntax mistakes, inconsistent spelling of âPythonâ)
Inconsistencies in reported results (regression slope discrepancy) and lack of error checking in code
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration uses relevant mathematics correctly, but remains at a basic to intermediate SL level with several errors and missed opportunities for deeper or advanced techniques. These factors constrain the criterion to a Band 2 performance.

strandSelections.reasoning: Explanations generally follow a logical sequence: formula â substitution â numeric outcome â verbal interpretation.  Paragraphing is clear and signposted.  Occasional interruptions by long code blocks and typographical errors slightly impede clarity but not to a large extent, matching the âgood logical structure and clear communicationâ descriptor.

Definitions and calculations are generally correct, but there are noticeable errors (wrong limit notation, coding syntax mistakes, mis-stated slope explanation).  These indicate some understanding with errors but not the âgood understanding with minor errorsâ required for band 3.

The student employs tables, algebraic expressions and descriptive statistics; however, there are no graphs or diagrams (e.g. scatter plot of GR vs streams) that would be expected for a correlation study.  Consequently more than one representation is present but their use is limited rather than âeffectiveâ.

The investigation follows a clear path from introduction â data collection â methods â results â discussion â conclusion.  Mathematical arguments (e.g. definition of Ï, formulae for GRD, correlation outputs) appear in the order required to answer the stated research question, and the narrative refers back to these results when interpreting findings.  Minor breaks in logic (such as the sudden appearance of Fourier analysis in the background but not in the body) and some misplaced headings prevent it from being âhighly coherentâ, but overall coherence is good and sustained.

Applying the golden ratio and Fibonacci numbers to modern pop music shows creativity, and writing custom Python scripts demonstrates initiative.  Nevertheless, the mathematical creativity remains moderate (basic descriptive statistics and correlations), aligning with the âgood levelâ rather than âexceptionalâ band.

Results are analysed sensibly: statistical significance is interpreted, limitations such as sample size and confounding variables are acknowledged.  However, the analysis stays at a descriptive level (no residual inspection, no alternative models), so it is thoughtful but not âdeep and insightfulâ.

The conclusion clearly states that GR/Fibonacci do not predict popularity and considers implications and future research directions.  This constitutes a clear evaluation, yet it is not comprehensiveâthere is little quantitative assessment of model error or confidence intervalsâso band 2 is most fitting.

The student reflects on methodological choices (e.g. why final chorus midpoint was used) and on the meaning of statistical results, offering more than a superficial remark.  Reflection is present throughout but lacks depth in justifying mathematical modelling choices, so it is âmeaningfulâ but not âsubstantialâ.

Mathematical terminology such as âPearsonâs râ, âcoefficient of determinationâ, âmid-pointâ, Ï, and correct algebraic/recursive definitions are generally used accurately; symbolic notation is mostly correct.  Yet several syntax mistakes (limit formula mis-typed, inconsistent bold/italics, code variables with spaces) show that usage is not flawless, so the work fits âmostly consistentâ rather than âfully consistentâ.

The work is clearly driven by the studentâs personal interest in Billie Eilish and in connecting music with mathematics; the rationale section makes this explicit and the exploration decisions (choice of variables, focus on chorus mid-point) reflect a personal pathway.  The approach is evident but not exceptionally innovative.

The bulk of the writing is relevant, but lengthy biographical background, repeated explanations of basic statistical terms and large code listings add superfluous volume.  Typographical clutter (e.g. repeated âPhytonâ) and very long tables inside the main text also reduce concision.  Hence the exploration is "mostly relevant with some unnecessary elements" rather than consistently concise.

Golden-ratio calculations, percentage matches and Pearson correlation are all directly relevant to the question and are executed appropriately.  The mathematics, while not advanced, is correctly targeted at the investigation, satisfying the descriptor for band 3.

Selecting an original data set (chorus timings, stream counts) and building personal code indicates significant independent thinking.  However, the mathematical techniques themselves are routine and drawn from standard statistical packages, stopping short of âoutstandingâ insight.

A detailed table of contents, numbered appendices and section headings give the work a clear three-part structure (introduction/body/conclusion).  Tables are labelled and referenced, and the flow of sections largely matches the table of contents.  Nonetheless, there are duplicated headings, missing page numbers and occasional disordered code blocks, so the organisation is âwell organisedâ rather than âexceptionallyâ so.

The mathematics used (basic algebra, descriptive statistics, Pearsonâs r) is mostly SL level and only partially matches the HL syllabus expectations (no calculus, series analysis, matrix work, etc.).  Thus it is âmostly at course levelâ rather than fully commensurate.

annotations.comment: The limit notation for Fibonacci convergence is mistyped as \(\lim_{n\to\infty}\frac{F_n}{F_n -1}\). It should read \(\lim_{n\to\infty}\frac{F_n}{F_{n-1}}=\phi\). Correct this for mathematical accuracy.
A stray overline â\(\overline{7}\)â appears at the end of the Aim section. Remove this artifact to avoid confusion.
The rationale section clearly connects personal interest and methodology, demonstrating genuine engagement with the topic. This personal approach enriches the exploration.
When citing that only 3 of 13 songs deviate by <5 s, include the corresponding percentage (â23%) to strengthen quantitative evaluation.
The regression slope is stated as 1.22 s per 1 s in the text but the fitted equation shows 1.13. Correct this discrepancy to ensure consistency.
Include a scatter plot of expected vs. actual chorus placements with the regression line to visually support the correlation analysis.
The interpretation mentions aesthetic factors but no analysis of melodic or harmonic elements is included. Suggest exploring these in future investigations.
The research question is split awkwardly across lines, disrupting flow and clarity. Consider consolidating it into a single, coherent statement to improve readability and logical development.
The table of contents contains duplicated headings and missing page numbers for key sections (e.g., Conclusion). Ensure consistency in structure and accurate referencing to enhance organization.
The biographical background on Billie Eilish is overly detailed and detracts from the mathematical focus. Trim or relocate this material to an appendix to maintain conciseness.
Typographical error: âalgebricallyâ should be âalgebraically.â Precise mathematical language improves clarity and professionalism.
Typo in Table 1: âPhyton Scriptâ should be âPython Script.â Correct variable and function names for code accuracy.
The formula for expected chorus start is given without justification of why dividing by Ï is appropriate. Add a brief derivation or rationale to underpin the model choice.
Typographical error in the equation label: âChorus Lengthtâ should read âChorus Lengthâ to maintain precise notation.
A visual representation (e.g., boxplot or histogram) of Golden Ratio deviation statistics would complement Table 2 and improve clarity of distributional insights.
The rationale for counting section matches to Fibonacci numbers could be expanded. Explain why section durations alone capture structural alignment.
Statistics in Table 3 use inconsistent decimal places (e.g., 0.00% vs 44.4%). Standardize rounding for professionalism and readability.
The p-value reporting in the Fibonacci correlation section appears misnamed in code. Ensure variable naming matches output formatting for accuracy.
Reliability section cites use of âmusical analysis softwareâ but earlier text indicates manual identification. Clarify methodology to resolve this contradiction.
Long code blocks appear in the main body rather than only in appendices. Relocate detailed listings to appendices and include concise summaries instead.
The document repeatedly misspells âPythonâ as âPhyton.â Consistent terminology in code enhances mathematical accuracy and professionalism.
The conclusion reiterates prior discussion with little new insight. Condense repetitive statements to maintain conciseness and relevance.
Citation style in the Resources section mixes formats. Adopt a consistent referencing style (e.g., MLA or APA) throughout for presentation polish.
In Appendix A, column headers are misaligned and some data cells appear truncated. Adjust table formatting for clarity.
Appendix B header typo: âLENGHTâ should be âLENGTH.â Correct errors in raw data titles to maintain professionalism.
The Python code in Appendix E contains syntax errors and spaces in variable names. Clean up and test code to ensure accurate mathematical computation.
Appendix G lists percentages with varying precision (two vs. one decimal place). Standardize formatting of numerical results for consistency.
The Python code in Appendix H uses inconsistent naming and lacks error checks. Refine code structure, use valid variable names, and validate results for rigor.
Speculative statements on âintentional manipulationâ lack supporting evidence. Tone down conjecture or include artist/producer commentary to substantiate.
